title: Increase in Russia's Fossil Fuel Export Revenues in May
description: Russia’s fossil fuel revenues rose in May 2026 despite unchanged export volumes, driven by higher prices and increased purchases from countries such as China, India, and Turkey. Several EU states also boosted imports, with Spain doubling LNG purchases. Ukrainian strikes on Russian oil infrastructure cut output at key facilities, including the Taman terminal, but Russia’s overall export income still reached €726 million per day.
